governingBody: List of books confiscated for violating Criminal Code 86, 86a, 130 or 130a authorities
reasonSummary: Confiscated by the Mannheim Regional Court in September 2012. Unofficial title translation: Auschwitz, The First Gassing, Rumors and Reality
